experiment_title: NO与水及空气反应的观察实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="NO与水及空气反应的观察实验" goal="观察二氧化氮气体（NO）与水和空气混合时的物理和化学变化" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="syringe_1" type="syringe" capacity="50 mL" />
      <Component id="latex_tube_1" type="latex_tube" />
      <Component id="spring_clip_1" type="spring_clip" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="NO_gas" state="gas" />
      <Reagent name="Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Air" state="gas" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="syringe_1" reagent="NO" volume="20 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="syringe_1" reagent="H2O" volume="5 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="latex_tube_1" vessel="syringe_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="spring_clip_1" vessel="latex_tube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="syringe_1" reagent="O2" volume="10 mL" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>
